Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like this school is[n]better equipped than others...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Instruments take up so much space... And we don't even use them that much.[n]{f 1 1}
